title: Module 1
content:
Basic ship parameters including existing ship stability condition, principal
particulars of the ship, general arrangement drawing of the ship.Fixation of
the revised dimensions based on the cargo capacity and redesignated
functions, layout general arrangement, including engine room lay out, deck
plans, water tight bulk head arrangements, fore peak and aft peak
arrangements, anchor and anchor handling arrangements, computation new
displacement.

title: Module 2
content:
Form coefficients for new dimensions, mid ship section design, revised
functions of stability criteria, cross curves stability, statical stability curves,
damaged stability, sea keeping manoeuvring, rudder design, steering gear
arrangement etc.

title: Module 3
content:
Shape of sectional area curve, bow and forward section forms, bulbous bow
design, stern forms, conventional method of lines design, propeller
clearances, propeller design, model testing, structural design, outfitting
production (hull), outfitting production (machinery).

title: Module 4
content:
Selection of main engine based on the revised powering and shaft
calculations, hull-propeller interaction, ship resistance under trial conditions,
additional resistance under service condition, rudder design.
